The '''Minisci Arcology''' was the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] building that served as the [[Ministry of Science (Galactic Republic)/Legends|Ministry of Science's]] headquarters.

==Appearances==
*{{HoloNetNewsWeb|50|business/1344_2.html|Ministry of Science Continues Hypermatter Studies}} {{1st}}
